---
title: "logit and expit"
format: 
  revealjs
editor: source
---

::: hidden
$$
\def\eqdef{\stackrel{\text{def}}{=}}
$$
:::

::: {.content-hidden when-format="revealjs"}
$$
\sb{\pi \eqdef \Prf{Y=1}}
\underbrace{
\overbrace{
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[ \frac{\odds}{1+\odds}]{}
}
{
   \xrightarrow{\frac{\pi}{1-\pi}}
}
\sb{\odds \eqdef \oddsf{Y=1}}
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\expf{\eta}]{}
}
{
   \xrightarrow{\logf{\odds}}
}
}^{\logitf{\pi}}
}_{\expitf{\eta}}
\sb{\eta \eqdef \text{log-odds}(Y=1)}
$$
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="revealjs"}
$$
\underbrace{\pi}_{\Prf{Y=1}}
\overbrace{
\underbrace{
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\frac{\odds}{1+\odds}]{}
}
{
   \xrightarrow{\frac{\pi}{1-\pi}}
}
\underbrace{\odds}_{\oddsf{Y=1}}
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\expf{\eta}]{}
}
{
   \xrightarrow{\logf{\odds}}
}
}_{\expitf{\eta}}
}^{\logitf{\pi}}
\underbrace{\eta}_{\text{log-odds}(Y=1)}
$$
:::
